_comment: THE GOALS MENU. A client picks 2-3 of these. Each goal pulls a known set of section TYPES and FUNCTIONS into the build plan. This is the mapping that turns planning into configuration. Section ids match sections.json; function ids match functions.json.

items.label: Be found
items.tagline: Rank in search, on the map, and in AI answers.
items.blurb: Show up when someone searches for what you do, in your city, at the moment they are ready to spend. Be the answer an AI assistant gives.

items.label: Earn trust
items.blurb: Put enough real signal at every touchpoint that a stranger decides you are worth contacting: real proof, real photos, specifics not adjectives.

items.label: Convert and capture
items.tagline: Turn a visitor into an owned lead.
items.blurb: Most visitors are not ready to buy today. The job today is to not lose them: capture the contact, make the next step easy.

items.label: Understand the customer
items.blurb: Know which searches bring them, where they hesitate, what offer wins, what they wish you offered. Zero-party data, collected at moments of high trust.

items.label: Scale and run without the owner
items.blurb: Let the system handle first contact and qualification, bring customers back, and turn data into better decisions about what to build and where to grow.
